cases.name: Pass - clear IT award and full compliance

input.text: Contract between BrightCode Pty Ltd and Priya Nair for Junior Software Developer under Professional Employees Award (IT stream). Placement is 260 hours over 8 weeks. Supervisor: Michael Lee, michael.lee@brightcode.com, +61 400 123 999. Student and employer names match submission. Duties include backend API development, testing and code reviews. Start date is in 3 weeks. Signed by both parties.
Intern agreement under Hospitality Industry (General) Award 2020 for role 'Venue Operations Assistant'. 300 hours, supervisor details provided, signed.

concerns: Award classification appears unrelated to IT/computing internship requirements.

input.text: Contract for Junior QA Intern under IT award. Placement states 120 total hours over 4 weeks. Supervisor is named with email. Signed by student and employer.

concerns: Documented hours are below the required internship threshold.

input.text: Agreement under IT award for 240 hours. Supervisor listed as 'Engineering Team' without person name or contact details. Technical duties are valid and contract is signed.

concerns: A specific supervisor identity and contact details are not provided.

cases.name: Fail - non-technical duties in tech company

input.text: Contract with ByteWave Technologies under IT award, 260 hours, supervisor provided. Role tasks are mostly front-desk support, calendar management, document filing and visitor handling. Signed and date-valid.

concerns: Role duties are primarily administrative and not substantively technical.

input.text: IT internship contract for 240 hours with named supervisor and technical duties, but signature blocks for both student and employer are blank.

concerns: Contract is not fully executed/signed by required parties.
